overview.short: Holy Trinity Cathedral is the cathedral church of Tirunelveli Diocese under Church of South India.
overview.description: Holy Trinity Cathedral is the cathedral church of Tirunelveli Diocese under Church of South India. Marvellous Church Crafted with the help of God.

topPlaces.name: Palayamkottai taluk
topPlaces.description: Palayamkottai taluk is a taluk of Tirunelveli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the town of Palayamkottai.

topPlaces.name: Palayamkottai
topPlaces.description: Palayamkottai (also Palayankottai) is a neighbourhood in Tirunelveli City, incorporated within the Tirunelveli City Municipal Corporation. It is situated on the east bank of the Thamirabarani river, with the exception of its downtown area, which is present on the west bank.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Palayamkottai
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Palayamkottai (Latin: Palayamkottaien(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Palayamkottai in the ecclesiastical province of Madurai in India.

topPlaces.name: Uchchhishta Ganapathy Temple
topPlaces.description: Uchchhishta Ganapathy Temple is an Uchchhishta Ganapati temple situated in Tirunelveli in the State of Tamil Nadu, in India. It is said to be the biggest Vinayagar temple in Asia.

topPlaces.name: Palayamkottai Central Prison
topPlaces.description: Palayamkottai Central Prison is located in Palayamkottai, Tirunelveli District, India. The prison was built during 1880 and was operating as a district jail until 1929.

topPlaces.name: Tirunelveli
topPlaces.description: Tirunelveli (Tamil: [tiɾɯnelʋeːli] ), also known as Nellai, is a city and municipal corporation in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on the southern part of the state, on the west bank of the Thamirabarani River.

topPlaces.name: Melapalayam
topPlaces.description: Melapalayam is a neighborhood of Tirunelveli City in Tamil Nadu, India situated on the east bank of the Thamirabarani River. The neighborhood's name comes from its location west (Tamil: mela) of Palayamkottai.

topPlaces.name: Nellaiappar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Nellaiappar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tirunelveli, a city in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Nellaiappar (also called Venuvananathar) represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Kanthimathi Amman.

items.note: Palayamkottai taluk is a taluk of Tirunelveli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the town of Palayamkottai.

Palayamkottai (also Palayankottai) is a neighbourhood in Tirunelveli City, incorporated within the Tirunelveli City Municipal Corporation. It is situated on the east bank of the Thamirabarani river, with the exception of its downtown area, which is present on the west bank.
The Roman Catholic Diocese of Palayamkottai (Latin: Palayamkottaien(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Palayamkottai in the ecclesiastical province of Madurai in India.
Uchchhishta Ganapathy Temple is an Uchchhishta Ganapati temple situated in Tirunelveli in the State of Tamil Nadu, in India. It is said to be the biggest Vinayagar temple in Asia.
Palayamkottai Central Prison is located in Palayamkottai, Tirunelveli District, India. The prison was built during 1880 and was operating as a district jail until 1929.

Tirunelveli (Tamil: [tiɾɯnelʋeːli] ), also known as Nellai, is a city and municipal corporation in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on the southern part of the state, on the west bank of the Thamirabarani River.

Melapalayam is a neighborhood of Tirunelveli City in Tamil Nadu, India situated on the east bank of the Thamirabarani River. The neighborhood's name comes from its location west (Tamil: mela) of Palayamkottai.

The Nellaiappar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tirunelveli, a city in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Nellaiappar (also called Venuvananathar) represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Kanthimathi Amman.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Holy Trinity Cathedral, Palayamkottai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Holy Trinity Cathedral, Palayamkottai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Holy Trinity Cathedral, Palayamkottai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (93 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Holy Trinity Cathedral, Palayamkottai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Holy Trinity Cathedral, Palayamkottai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Holy Trinity Cathedral, Palayamkottai?
faq.a: Stays in Holy Trinity Cathedral, Palayamkottai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Holy Trinity Cathedral, Palayamkottai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Palayamkottai taluk, Palayamkottai, Diocese of Palayamkottai, Uchchhishta Ganapathy Temple, Palayamkottai Central Prison.
